title: Trump says he’s never heard of term ‘corner store’
shortDescription: At a tax roundtable in Nevada, President Donald Trump claimed he's never heard of the term "corner store," sparking disbelief online.

title: RFK on Trump: ‘He is very, very sane’
shortDescription: HHS Sec. Robert F. Kennedy Jr. responded that President Trump is "very, very sane" when questioned on a number of the president's Truth Social posts.

title: Trump stops Catholic Charities 'Pedro Pan' funding. What the money did
shortDescription: The Trump administration didn't renew a contract with the Catholic Charities in Miami, which has helped unaccompanied immigrant children for decades.

title: How to watch Trump speaking at Turning Point event in Phoenix, Arizona
shortDescription: President Donald Trump is stopping by a Turning Point USA event in Phoenix, Arizona on April 17. Here is how to watch his speech.

title: What is a democratic socialist? Why Trump keeps going after Mamdani
shortDescription: Mayor Zohran Mamdani and President Donald Trump have kept a sometimes-tense relationship despite political differences.

title: Trump picks Dr. Erica Schwartz for CDC director
shortDescription: Trump nominates Dr. Erica Schwartz, retired USPHS rear admiral and COVID-era deputy surgeon general, as CDC director.

title: Exclusive: Trump talks Strait of Hormuz with USA TODAY
shortDescription: President Donald Trump spoke on the Strait of Hormuz in a Friday phone call with USA TODAY.

title: Mayor Mamdani answers Trump's Truth Social callout; what he said
shortDescription: Zohran Mamdani responded to a recent Truth Social post by the president slamming his new tax plan.

title: 'A great victory': Trump says Strait of Hormuz fight is 'over' | Exclusive
shortDescription: Trump spoke to USA TODAY about latest developments in Iran. 'We've had a great victory and we're going to finish it off,' he said.

title: Why is Trump angry with Mamdani, again? Inside the latest feud
shortDescription: President Donald Trump wrote that the U.S. should "not contribute" to the city's failure after Mamdani revealed a plan to tax richer residents.

title: Judge halts White House ballroom construction again
shortDescription: A judge said the White House construction needs express authorization from Congress. The Trump administration argued stopping work leaves it “open and exposed,” risking national security.

title: Why this East Coast special election could have wider impacts
shortDescription: A congressional map is on the ballot in Virginia.

title: Progressive Dem wins NJ special election: Results and why it matters
shortDescription: Progressive Democrat Analilia Mejia is headed to Washington.

title: Iran declares Hormuz 'open.' Trump says US blockade will continue
shortDescription: President Trump thanked Iran for declaring the Strait of Hormuz "completely open," but said the U.S. blockade on Iranian ports will continue.

title: Trump touts tax tips policy in Vegas, says Iran war is going 'swimmingly'
shortDescription: President Trump used a rare visit to Las Vegas to tout his no tax on tips policy, and also gave promising predictions on the Iran war.

title: Trump calls DoorDash delivery 'a little tacky'
shortDescription: President Donald Trump described a recent DoorDash delivery to the oval office as "a little tacky."

title: Mejia wins New Jersey special election
shortDescription: Democrat Analilia Mejia has won the special election to fill the empty 11th Congressional District seat representing northern New Jersey.

title: Judge once again halts White House ballroom
shortDescription: A federal judge once again issued an order halting construction on President Trump's White House ballroom until it gets "authorization from Congress."

title: Democrat Analilia Mejia wins New Jersey special election for House seat
shortDescription: Mejia, a progressive Democrat who ran Bernie Sanders 2020 presidential campaign, beat her GOP opponent for Mikie Sherrill's House seat.

title: Judge halts White House ballroom. Trump reveals hospital's part of project
shortDescription: The Trump administration had argued that the entire ballroom construction needed to proceed or it would leave the White House "open and exposed."

title: Trump clashes with Pope Leo over Iran war
shortDescription: President Trump said Pope Leo isn't disrespectful in criticizing the Iran war but needs to understand the importance of disarming Iran.

title: Trump nominates Erica Schwartz as new CDC director
shortDescription: President Trump announced new leadership at the Centers for ​Disease Control and Prevention, nominating former Deputy Surgeon General Erica Schwartz.
